title: The Identical Corridor

features.name: repeated-door
features.desc-on-touch: you open it and find yourself in the corridor again. you open another and find the same corridor still. the night stopped arriving when it got here

features.name: ice-machine-hum
features.desc-on-touch: the ice falls in the same pattern every cycle. you have heard this sound for hours or seconds; the motel has stopped dividing time

features.name: numberless-room-key
features.desc-on-touch: every room is the same room. the number was the same when you checked in. you check in again. the night is your neighbor in every direction

features.name: fluorescent-watermark
features.desc-on-touch: something leaked here. the motel is sweating. the wall remembers being a different wall, in a different night, but the night is the same, so the wall stays confused

features.name: end-corridor-vanishing
features.desc-on-touch: the corridor ends where you cannot see. you walk toward it and arrive where you started. the architecture has become time, or time has become walls

inscription: every room is tonight, and tonight arrives again in every room

file.name: MotelRoomAmbienceTape_SideARepeating.wav
file.note: ERROR: archive has exceeded witness — this recording has played for 4847 days without progress toward dawn

reverie.title: REVERIE — the night that learned to stay
narr: She sits on the edge of the motel bed; he stands at the
window, watching the parking lot. Neither of them moves.
The ice machine cycles. The night does not. She says:
'We could leave.' He says: 'Look at your watch.' The
watch shows the same time as the clock on the wall. Both
of them are right. Neither of you arrives.

exits.label: back along the corridor toward the first arrival
toward rooms where guests made different choices
up the stairwell where the next floor is identical
down toward the front desk, where checking out never happens
